title: battandiera pulchra
intro: Battandiera pulchra, also known as the beautiful Battandiera, is a flowering plant species in the succulent family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Battandiera pulchra include its ability to soothe burns, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Battandiera pulchra is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
intro_study: According to "Plants (Basel, Switzerland)", battandiera pulchra (or more accurately, Pulicaria undulata) has been found to have antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties, as well as contain various phenolic and flavonoid compounds.
